channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE is gaining significant buzz in the K-pop scene, making their world tour a must-see event.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire promise a nostalgic night filled with classic hits from two legendary acts.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's return to the stage is highly anticipated, especially following his successful solo career.

item.title: Weezer @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-10 02:00 — Weezer at Chase Center. Weezer continues to maintain a strong live reputation, making their gathering tour an exciting event.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's performance is a unique opportunity to see her live, especially with her distinctive style.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's innovative live shows are always a highlight, promising a visually and musically engaging experience.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle is known for their captivating performances, making their world tour a significant event in the K-pop landscape.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. Benson Boone is an emerging artist with a growing fanbase, making his tour noteworthy.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Mon Laferte @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-07 04:00 — Mon Laferte at SAP Center at San Jose. Mon Laferte's unique blend of genres and powerful performances make her tour an exciting prospect.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose. Three Days Grace's solid reputation for energetic live shows makes their upcoming tour appealing.

item.title: Johnny Blue Skies @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-16 02:00 — Johnny Blue Skies at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Johnny Blue Skies offers a compelling live experience that is sure to resonate with audiences.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bleachers' engaging performances and strong fan connection make this show a must-see.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's laid-back style and strong live reputation make his tour a great choice for fans.

item.title: Santana @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-10 02:00 — Santana at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Santana and The Doobie Brothers together is a classic rock lover's dream, promising a night of unforgettable music.

item.title: John Mellencamp @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-13 03:00 — John Mellencamp at Shoreline Amphitheatre. John Mellencamp's legacy and hits make his show a nostalgic highlight for fans.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's tour is generating buzz, making it a noteworthy event for indie music fans.
